rows.label: qev011503_MSG0034
rows.name: Please bring me the Iron Blade and Battle Body![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0035
rows.name:
Before I end up burnt to a crisp by my burning sense of adventure,
hurry up and bring them to me right now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0036
rows.name:
Ah, welcome back!
Walter-kyoukan actually came by a little while ago~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0037
rows.name:
I had to listen to another long speech
telling me to give up on becoming a BLADE,
but I generously let it all go in one ear and out the other~[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0038
rows.name:
Because I'm a fledgling bird flying out of NLA!
Now, please hand over what I asked for.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0039
rows.name:
First up is the Iron Blade,
capable of cutting a Milesauro right in half![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0050
rows.name: Ooh, tears of joy![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0049
rows.name:
Now, please give me the Battle Body,
which won't flinch even from a charging Zuusu![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0040
rows.name:
Deepest gratitude and appreciation!
With this equipment, I won't lose to any native creature.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0041
rows.name:
Thank you so much!
Oh, come to think of it, I haven't heard your name.
Please tell me![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_JNK0070
rows.name: Answer

rows.label: qev011503_SEL0071
rows.name: Give her your name.

rows.label: qev011503_JNK0080
rows.name: Evade

rows.label: qev011503_SEL0081
rows.name: Say you're just a passing BLADE.

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0042
rows.name: Heh, that's a nice name—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0043
rows.name:
But it's hard to remember,
so I'm going to call you Senpai
from now on![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0044
rows.name:
Mmph?!
Then I'll just give you a nickname myself—[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0045
rows.name:
I'm going to call you Senpai from now on!
You don't have the right to refuse![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0046
rows.name:
Alright!
Now that I'm prepared, there's no time to lose!
I'm heading out![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0047
rows.name:
I'll show Walter-kyoukan by performing so well
I won't lose to a real BLADE~![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev011503_MSG0048
rows.name:
Thank you, Senpai!
Next time we meet, it'll be outside the city!![ST:wait ]
